account_prerequisites.details: sarah.chen@rqa.tech or similar company domain email
account_prerequisites.verification_method: Check email access and LinkedIn account association

account_prerequisites.details: Valid credit card with sufficient limit for $8,000/month charge
account_prerequisites.verification_method: Confirm card details and billing address

account_prerequisites.details: Existing LinkedIn account associated with company email
account_prerequisites.verification_method: Log in to LinkedIn and verify account details

system_prerequisites.details: Chrome, Firefox, Safari, or Edge browser
Ability to take screenshots for verification

step_1_navigate.title: Navigate to LinkedIn Premium
step_1_navigate.description: Open web browser and access LinkedIn Premium page
detailed_instructions: Open your preferred web browser (Chrome recommended)
Navigate to https://www.linkedin.com/premium
Ensure you are logged into your LinkedIn account
Verify the Premium plans page loads correctly
step_1_navigate.expected_result: Premium plans page displays with available options
success_criteria: User is logged into LinkedIn account
potential_issues: Not logged into LinkedIn - log in first
Page doesn't load - check internet connection
Browser compatibility issues - try different browser

step_2_select_plan.title: Select Business Plan
step_2_select_plan.description: Choose the Business plan option for $8,000/month
detailed_instructions: Locate the 'Business' plan option on the Premium plans page
Click on the Business plan card or button
Review the plan features and pricing ($8,000/month)
Confirm Business plan is selected
step_2_select_plan.expected_result: Business plan is highlighted as selected
success_criteria: Plan features are visible and appropriate
potential_issues: Cannot find Business plan - scroll or search the page
Pricing doesn't match - verify current LinkedIn pricing
Selection doesn't stick - try clicking again or refreshing

step_3_enter_billing.title: Enter Billing Information
step_3_enter_billing.description: Fill in company billing details using company credit card
detailed_instructions: Click 'Continue' or 'Upgrade' button after selecting Business plan
Enter company billing information:
- Company name: RQA Technologies Inc.
- Billing address: Company address
- Credit card details: Valid company card
Review all entered information for accuracy
Accept Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
step_3_enter_billing.expected_result: Billing information is accepted and payment processing begins
potential_issues: Card declined - verify card details and balance
Invalid billing address - confirm company address
Terms not accepted - check all required checkboxes
Network timeout - retry or check connection

step_4_confirm_upgrade.title: Confirm Upgrade
step_4_confirm_upgrade.description: Review terms and complete the upgrade process
detailed_instructions: Review final order summary and charges
Confirm billing cycle (monthly) and amount ($8,000)
Click 'Upgrade Now' or 'Complete Purchase' button
Wait for payment processing confirmation
Note any confirmation numbers or reference codes
step_4_confirm_upgrade.expected_result: Payment is processed and upgrade confirmation is received
success_criteria: No error messages in payment process
potential_issues: Payment fails - check card details or try alternative payment
Confirmation delayed - wait a few minutes and refresh
Account not updated immediately - may take a few minutes
Duplicate charge - contact LinkedIn support if needed

step_5_verify_activation.title: Verify Activation
step_5_verify_activation.description: Check account settings to confirm Premium Business status
detailed_instructions: Navigate to your LinkedIn account settings
Look for Premium subscription information
Verify 'Premium Business' badge or status
Check for new Premium features availability
Confirm billing information and next payment date
Test access to business analytics if available
step_5_verify_activation.expected_result: Premium Business account is confirmed active
success_criteria: Premium Business badge visible in account
potential_issues: Badge not visible immediately - wait 5-10 minutes and refresh
Features not accessible - try logging out and back in
Billing shows wrong plan - contact LinkedIn support
Account status unclear - check account settings thoroughly

account_verification.check: Premium Business badge visible in profile/settings
account_verification.method: Check account dropdown or settings page
account_verification.expected: Premium Business badge or status indicator

account_verification.method: Look for analytics section in Premium features

account_verification.expected: Job posting tools and credits visible

payment_verification.method: Check online banking or card app
payment_verification.expected: LinkedIn charge for $8,000 (may show as pending)

solutions: Verify card number, expiration date, and CVV
Confirm billing address matches card statement
Check card balance and credit limit
Contact bank to confirm card status
payment_issues.escalation: If all solutions fail, escalate to LinkedIn premium support

solutions: Log out and log back into LinkedIn
Wait 10-15 minutes for activation to propagate
account_issues.escalation: If account issues persist, contact LinkedIn premium support team

technical_issues.escalation: If technical issues continue, document steps and contact LinkedIn support

emergency_contacts.backup_payment: Alternative company credit card or payment method

immediate_actions: Log in if not already logged in

communication_protocol.backup_contact: Have technical support ready if needed

contingency_plans.step1_incomplete: Proceed to manual job posting alternatives
contingency_plans.time_delays: Accelerate remaining steps or extend timeline
